violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Table top sani cloth stated as changed out daily and is not kept in a sani bucket between uses. -Sani Bucket at espresso station found cloudy with less than 150ppm Quat solution.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Undercounter refrigerator found with milk temperature of 51 and standing water in bottom of unit. *Directed staff to move product to different refrigeration and suggested defrosting unit. Will need to contact service agent if defrost does not correct issue.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Rough, unsealed concrete counter at espresso machine.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Stained/worn butcher block in bakery area (stated that dough is placed onto pans/not butcher block). Staining appears to be caused by sheet pans.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue at interior surface of bakery ovens.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Build up of dust/debris on 2 round fans at deli prep and 1 round fan at bakery prep. -Limescale build up at water well of bakery proof box. -Frost build up at interior surfaces of basement chest freezer. -Spill at top of basement chest freezer.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found with 0ppm Chlorine. Staff hand been unaware of issue and dishes had been done throughout day. *Service tech was on-site for other issue,discovered kink in line and was working to fix/replace Chlorine line before my departure.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Unfinished wall surface above basement stairs has plastic taped to studs. Spill from above (at 3 door freezer) had leaked through and dripped onto basement chest freezer.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. *Dessert display case at service counter is not covered. Top shelf foods are not well protected.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -OSB lid storage cart at espresso has rough surfaces, due for reseal.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Bakery proofing boards are being wiped with sanitizer, not washed, rinsed and sanitized. Food residue present at edges of stored "clean" boards

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Rough, unsealed cement counter at espresso machine. -Tool drawer at espresso station is warped and damaged.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Bakery butcher board is visibly stained, due for deep clean/resurface/reseal.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Carbon/debris at bottom interiors of deli ovens and bakery ovens. -Dust/flour build up on floor fan in bakery. -Some crumb debris/dust at bottom shelves of bakery prep tables. -Small fan in basement has build up of dust. -Some frost build up at interior surfaces of basement chest freezer.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Should have chlorine test strips for chlorine dishwasher and Quat test strips (QT10; QT40 or QT44) for Quat sanitizer buckets.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -6 boxes of single use items stored on floor in basement storage area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Bakery box flats stored on top of refrigerator are not stored inverted to protect food contact surfaces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor seal has worn through to cement in several places throughout facility.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
